untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection requires visual/geometric pattern recognition (pole identification, consolidation zone boundaries, breakout confirmation) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed point-in-time indicators and operators. The signal requires detection of: (1) a sharp directional move (pole), (2) a consolidation period with specific geometric properties, and (3) breakout confirmation — all of which need multi-bar pattern analysis unavailable in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using ADX (trend strength) + price vs SMA (directional context) to approximate flag breakout conditions, but this is not a true flag pattern detector. The 64% bull success rate and 23% average rise suggest a moderately bullish continuation setup; exit uses mean reversion logic (reversal below/above SMA_20) as author provided no exit guidance. Parameters like failure_rate_10pct and regime-dependent success rates could not be encoded in rule conditions.
